title: haplophyllum glaberrimum
intro: Haplophyllum glaberrimum, also known as the smooth bitter orange, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum glaberrimum include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-anxiety agent. The herbal preparation of Haplophyllum glaberrimum typically involves the use of its roots, leaves, and stems, which can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused in oil for topical application.
